---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem or use case

What are you trying to do that is currently difficult or impossible? Describe the situation,
not just the proposed solution.

## Proposed solution

What you would like the tool to do.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you currently use, or other approaches you thought about.

## Scope and compatibility

- Would this change existing CLI flags, output layout, or the default download path?
- Is it a GUI feature, a CLI feature, or both?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or example CYOA sites that would benefit from this feature.
